nasb.text: In righteousness you will be established; You will be far from oppression, for you will not fear; And from terror, for it will not come near you.

esv.text: In righteousness you shall be established; you shall be far from oppression, for you shall not fear; and from terror, for it shall not come near you.

cnv.text: 你必因公義得以堅立； 你必遠離欺壓，你必無所懼怕； 你也必遠離驚嚇，因為驚嚇必不會臨近你。

ccb.text: 你必因公义而坚立， 再不会受欺压， 也不会担惊受怕， 因为恐惧不会临近你。

csbs.text: 你必藉着公义坚立； 你必远离欺压，不会害怕， 也必远离惊吓，因惊吓必不临近你。
